rules.when: work changes project direction, live operations, credentials, financial data, or production state
rules.reason: Ryan must approve the exact project-local work block before execution

rules.when: work requires source-of-truth judgment, cross-file integration, or final intake
rules.reason: Codex owns Runway OS stewardship and verified integration

rules.when: a second opinion or specialist critique could reduce rework
rules.reason: Only a reviewed, non-financial handoff packet may leave the primary context
